benchmark_result.review_text: My husband and I worked with Jeremy for our estate planning. He is incredibly knowledgeable, experienced, and thorough, bringing a high level of integrity to what he does. I expected the process of creating a will and thinking through everything to be daunting, however Jeremy ensured that we covered it all and guided us through our different options, patiently answering all of our questions from the beginning. He was very kind and made the process painless. Would highly recommend.
